---
title: "Publications"
echo: false
jupyter: python3
section-divs: false
keep-md: true
---


```{python}
from utilities import *

pub_strs = load_publication_data("../publications.yaml")

# Write debug info to a file
with open("publications_debug.txt", "w") as f:
    f.write("DEBUG INFO:\n\n")
    f.write(f"Years found in pubs: {sorted(pub_strs['pubs'].keys(), reverse=True)}\n")
    f.write(f"Years found in wps: {sorted(pub_strs['wps'].keys(), reverse=True)}\n\n")
    
    for year in [2026, 2025, 2023, 2022, 2021]:
        if year in pub_strs["pubs"]:
            f.write(f"Year {year}: {len(pub_strs['pubs'][year])} publication(s) in pubs\n")
        elif year in pub_strs["wps"]:
            f.write(f"Year {year}: {len(pub_strs['wps'][year])} publication(s) in wps\n")
        else:
            f.write(f"Year {year}: NOT FOUND\n")
    
    f.write("\n\nFull pub_strs structure:\n")
    f.write(str(pub_strs))
```

*My list of publications is also on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pu9BpO0AAAAJ&hl).*


```{python}
#| label: "published"
#| id: "published"
#| output: asis
for year in sorted(pub_strs["pubs"], reverse=True):
    display(HTML(
        "<ul class='list-group list-group-flush'>" + '\n'.join(pub_strs["pubs"][year]) + "</ul>"
    ))
```
